verses.text: If you obey, all these blessings shall come upon you. Blessing. Obedience brings God's favour.
If you obey, all these blessings shall come upon you. Blessing. Obedience brings God's favour.
Blessed in city and field, coming in and going out. Blessed. God's favour reaches all of life.
Blessed in city and field, coming in and going out. Blessed. God's favour reaches all of life.
Blessed in city and field, coming in and going out. Blessed. God's favour reaches all of life.
Blessed in city and field, coming in and going out. Blessed. God's favour reaches all of life.
Your enemies flee; God commands blessing on your store. Victory. The LORD fights and provides.
Your enemies flee; God commands blessing on your store. Victory. The LORD fights and provides.
He establishes you holy; the nations fear you. Holy. You bear His name.
He establishes you holy; the nations fear you. Holy. You bear His name.
Plenty and rain; you the head, not the tail. Head. Obedience exalts.
Plenty and rain; you the head, not the tail. Head. Obedience exalts.
Plenty and rain; you the head, not the tail. Head. Obedience exalts.
Plenty and rain; you the head, not the tail. Head. Obedience exalts.
But if you disobey, all these curses shall come. Curse. Rebellion brings ruin.
But if you disobey, all these curses shall come. Curse. Rebellion brings ruin.
But if you disobey, all these curses shall come. Curse. Rebellion brings ruin.
But if you disobey, all these curses shall come. Curse. Rebellion brings ruin.
But if you disobey, all these curses shall come. Curse. Rebellion brings ruin.
Cursing, vexation, pestilence, and drought come upon you. Plagues. God's hand turns against them.
Cursing, vexation, pestilence, and drought come upon you. Plagues. God's hand turns against them.
Cursing, vexation, pestilence, and drought come upon you. Plagues. God's hand turns against them.
Cursing, vexation, pestilence, and drought come upon you. Plagues. God's hand turns against them.
Cursing, vexation, pestilence, and drought come upon you. Plagues. God's hand turns against them.
Defeat, disease, madness, and groping at noonday. Smitten. Body and mind fail.
Defeat, disease, madness, and groping at noonday. Smitten. Body and mind fail.
Defeat, disease, madness, and groping at noonday. Smitten. Body and mind fail.
Defeat, disease, madness, and groping at noonday. Smitten. Body and mind fail.
Defeat, disease, madness, and groping at noonday. Smitten. Body and mind fail.
Others enjoy your house, your wife, and your fruit. Robbed. The fruit of labour is lost.
Others enjoy your house, your wife, and your fruit. Robbed. The fruit of labour is lost.
Others enjoy your house, your wife, and your fruit. Robbed. The fruit of labour is lost.
Others enjoy your house, your wife, and your fruit. Robbed. The fruit of labour is lost.
Madness, and exile to serve other gods. Astonishment. They become a byword.
Madness, and exile to serve other gods. Astonishment. They become a byword.
Madness, and exile to serve other gods. Astonishment. They become a byword.
Madness, and exile to serve other gods. Astonishment. They become a byword.
Locusts and worms devour all that you sow. Devoured. The land yields nothing.
Locusts and worms devour all that you sow. Devoured. The land yields nothing.
Locusts and worms devour all that you sow. Devoured. The land yields nothing.
Locusts and worms devour all that you sow. Devoured. The land yields nothing.
Locusts and worms devour all that you sow. Devoured. The land yields nothing.
The stranger rises; you sink; these are signs for ever. Reversed. The blessed become cursed.
The stranger rises; you sink; these are signs for ever. Reversed. The blessed become cursed.
The stranger rises; you sink; these are signs for ever. Reversed. The blessed become cursed.
The stranger rises; you sink; these are signs for ever. Reversed. The blessed become cursed.
Because you served not God with joy, a fierce nation comes. Invaded. Ingratitude invites the foe.
Because you served not God with joy, a fierce nation comes. Invaded. Ingratitude invites the foe.
Because you served not God with joy, a fierce nation comes. Invaded. Ingratitude invites the foe.
Because you served not God with joy, a fierce nation comes. Invaded. Ingratitude invites the foe.
They besiege you, and you eat your own children. Siege. Horror crowns the curse.
They besiege you, and you eat your own children. Siege. Horror crowns the curse.
They besiege you, and you eat your own children. Siege. Horror crowns the curse.
The tender and delicate become cruel in the siege. Cruelty. Famine unmans them.
The tender and delicate become cruel in the siege. Cruelty. Famine unmans them.
The tender and delicate become cruel in the siege. Cruelty. Famine unmans them.
The tender and delicate become cruel in the siege. Cruelty. Famine unmans them.
If you fear not the name, God brings strange plagues. Plagues. His name is to be feared.
If you fear not the name, God brings strange plagues. Plagues. His name is to be feared.
If you fear not the name, God brings strange plagues. Plagues. His name is to be feared.
If you fear not the name, God brings strange plagues. Plagues. His name is to be feared.
You are left few; God rejoices to destroy as once to bless. Few. The many are brought low.
You are left few; God rejoices to destroy as once to bless. Few. The many are brought low.
Scattered among the nations, with a trembling heart. Scattered. No rest is found.
Scattered among the nations, with a trembling heart. Scattered. No rest is found.
Scattered among the nations, with a trembling heart. Scattered. No rest is found.
You long for death and are sold to Egypt again. Despair. The curse ends where bondage began.
You long for death and are sold to Egypt again. Despair. The curse ends where bondage began.
